channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Kristen Bell Loves Being Married to Dax Shepard: 'He's Never Allergic to Me Shining More and More' (Exclusive)
item.description: The ‘Nobody Wants This’ star has “put a lot of work into” her marriage, she says

item.title: Sharon Osbourne Reveals Ozzy 'Knew' He Didn't Have Long to Live Before Black Sabbath Final Gig but 'Wanted to Do It So Bad'
item.description: "He needed it," Sharon said of the Back to the Beginning show on the Saturday, Feb. 21 episode of the 'Dumb Blonde' podcast

item.title: Hilary Duff Says Her 'Heart Aches' Over “Lizzie McGuire” Dad Robert Carradine's Death at 71
item.description: "I always felt so cared for by my on-screen parents," Duff wrote in an Instagram tribute

item.title: Jennifer Garner Admits There's a 'Little Bit of Loss' in the Way She Parents Her 3 Kids After Split from Ben Affleck
item.description: The former couple shares three kids together — Violet, 20, Seraphina, 17, and Samuel, 13

item.title: Michelle Pfeiffer Grapples with Family 'Tragedy' in Official Trailer for Taylor Sheridan's “The Madison”
item.description: The new Taylor Sheridan series is described as his "most intimate work to date"

item.title: 'American Idol' Contestant Dimitrius Graham Arrested in Los Angeles
item.description: "American Idol" finalist Dimitrius Graham was arrested in Los Angeles Sunday and booked on a trespassing charge ... TMZ has learned. The head-turning ...

item.title: Offset Gets Physical On WWE 'RAW,' Throws Grayson Waller Over Table
item.description: Offset didn't just hit up "Monday Night Raw" in Atlanta to catch some WWE action ... he was IN on the action -- 'cause the Grammy-nominated rapper fou...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie Kidnapper Still Photo Did Not Produce Any Significant Leads
item.description: Nancy Guthrie's kidnapper was at her house before the actual kidnapping, but the photo of the presumed kidnapper has not resulted in any significant l...

item.title: Jack Hughes Downplays Trump Phone Call Controversy, Defends Women’s Team
item.description: Team USA’s toothless hero Jack Hughes is making it clear there's nothing but love between the men's and women's gold medal-winning squads ... saying a...

item.title: Robert Carradine's Daughter Shares Heartfelt Tribute After His Death
item.description: Robert Carradine's daughter says her dad was a lover, not a fighter ... and, the whole world could learn a lesson by trying to follow his example, she...
